notes: Fixed 16 failing tests: 6 in shaderDisplacement.test.ts (substring searches were matching function definitions in prepended noise3d.glsl instead of call sites in shader body), 9 in particleField.test.ts (tests expected CPU-side buffer manipulation but particleField now uses ShaderMaterial with GPU-side displacement). All 684 tests pass, TypeScript compiles cleanly, production build succeeds.
